Package com.stzteam.mars.test

Class TestRoutine

java.lang.Object
com.stzteam.mars.test.TestRoutine
public abstract class TestRoutine extends Object
The abstract base class for defining hardware testing sequences in the MARS framework. Provides a rich suite of WPILib Command factories (assertions, delays, waits) allowing developers to build robust, sequential pit-test routines to verify hardware functionality.

    Description

    assertGreaterThan(DoubleSupplier valueSupplier, double min, String message)
    Verifies that a given value is strictly greater than a minimum threshold.
    protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command
    assertLessThan(DoubleSupplier valueSupplier, double max, String message)
    Verifies that a given value is strictly less than a maximum threshold.
    protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command
    assertTrue(BooleanSupplier condition, String message)
    Verifies that a given boolean condition evaluates to true.
    protected DoubleSupplier
    calculateError(double target, double position)
    A helper method to create a supplier that continuously calculates the absolute error between a target setpoint and a current position (useful for PID verification).

    delay(double seconds)
    Pauses the test execution for a specified duration.

    Wraps a MARS Request into an instantaneous WPILib Command, injecting it directly into the specified ModularSubsystem.

    Wraps a standard runnable action into an instantaneous WPILib Command.
    protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command
    waitFor(BooleanSupplier condition, double timeoutSeconds)
    Creates a command that halts the test sequence until a specific condition is met, or until the timeout is reached.

  • Constructor Details

    • TestRoutine

      public TestRoutine()

  • Method Details

    • getRoutineCommand

      public abstract edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command getRoutineCommand()
      Defines the complete sequence of commands to execute for this specific test.
      Returns:
      A composed WPILib Command representing the full test routine.

    • waitFor

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command waitFor(BooleanSupplier condition, double timeoutSeconds)
      Creates a command that halts the test sequence until a specific condition is met, or until the timeout is reached.
      Parameters:
      condition - The boolean condition to wait for.
      timeoutSeconds - The maximum time to wait before moving on (to prevent hanging).
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.

    • calculateError

      protected DoubleSupplier calculateError(double target, double position)
      A helper method to create a supplier that continuously calculates the absolute error between a target setpoint and a current position (useful for PID verification).
      Parameters:
      target - The desired setpoint.
      position - The current measured position.
      Returns:
      A DoubleSupplier returning the absolute error.

    • run

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command run(Runnable action, edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Subsystem... requirements)
      Wraps a standard runnable action into an instantaneous WPILib Command.
      Parameters:
      action - The logic to execute.
      requirements - The subsystems required by this action.
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.

    • run

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command run(Request request, ModularSubsystem requirements)
      Wraps a MARS Request into an instantaneous WPILib Command, injecting it directly into the specified ModularSubsystem.
      Parameters:
      request - The state/action request to apply.
      requirements - The subsystem that will execute the request.
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.

    • delay

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command delay(double seconds)
      Pauses the test execution for a specified duration.
      Parameters:
      seconds - The amount of time to wait.
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.

    • assertLessThan

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command assertLessThan(DoubleSupplier valueSupplier, double max, String message)
      Verifies that a given value is strictly less than a maximum threshold. Logs the result directly to the terminal using TerminalGCS.
      Parameters:
      valueSupplier - A lambda providing the current value to check.
      max - The maximum allowed value.
      message - The contextual message to log if the assertion fails.
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.

    • assertGreaterThan

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command assertGreaterThan(DoubleSupplier valueSupplier, double min, String message)
      Verifies that a given value is strictly greater than a minimum threshold. Logs the result directly to the terminal using TerminalGCS.
      Parameters:
      valueSupplier - A lambda providing the current value to check.
      min - The minimum allowed value.
      message - The contextual message to log if the assertion fails.
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.

    • assertTrue

      protected edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command assertTrue(BooleanSupplier condition, String message)
      Verifies that a given boolean condition evaluates to true. Logs the result directly to the terminal using TerminalGCS.
      Parameters:
      condition - A lambda providing the boolean condition to check.
      message - The contextual message to log if the assertion fails.
      Returns:
      A WPILib Command.
